channel.title: Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Initial Post
item.description:
Introduction

Hello, today I want to talk about blah blah.

A increases B (Choi & Seo, 2018).

Choi & Seo (2018) have explored blah blah.

Literature Review

Caregiver

Palliative Caregiving

The following illustrates the histogram of xx:

hist(airquality$Ozone, col="blue")

References

Choi, S., & Seo, J. (2018). Effects of nonpharmacological interventions for fatigue in patients with heart failure: A systematic review and meta-analysis. Journal of Cardiac Failure, 24(8), S73–S74.

item.title: Perception of illness and Uncertainty in Patients with Heart Failure
The Rapidly Changing World of Accessible Online Learning
item.description: This panel discussion has been presented in 2017 AECT in Florida.

item.title: The Influence of Self-care agency and Social support as factors influencing Self-care practice in Spinal cord injured patients
item.description: This work will be presented in the 13th International Conference of the Learning Sciences in London, UK.
